task: Use hardened pond-backed Inside Voice to review risks and safeguards for a bounded operational entropy replay exercise. The exercise compares visible-only replay and full-lineage replay on one deterministic local scenario. Do not validate public claims. Do not claim broad capability. Return only bounded risk pressure, required safeguards, and replay-separation checks.

context.summary: Entropy-risk gate only. This request does not ask for proof validation, public claim validation, or broad conclusions. It only asks Inside Voice to identify risks, safeguards, and replay-separation requirements before constructing one bounded local entropy scenario.
constraints: surface risks without treating them as defects
compare visible-only replay and full-lineage replay only within one bounded local scenario
